title: Q2 enterprise win rate sits at 31%, nine points above the trailing four-quarter average
anchor: Enterprise closed-won rate runs at 30.77% over 26 deals, with 8 wins at an average $187K per close.
connect: The trailing four quarters averaged 22.22% across 180 deals.
body: Enterprise closed-won rate runs at 30.77% over 26 deals, with 8 wins at an average $187K per close. The trailing four quarters averaged 22.22% across 180 deals.
trace: Q2 enterprise win rate at 30.77% represents a meaningful improvement over the 22.22% four-quarter baseline, suggesting execution or positioning shifts in the enterprise segment.

title: Marketing-sourced enterprise deals convert at 29%, double the outbound rate

trace: Source-level win rate variance in enterprise shows marketing qualification producing higher-quality opportunities than outbound prospecting.
